programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After defeating Hordy, Luffy turns his attention to stopping the Noah from crushing Fish-Man Island. Straw Hats and Fish-Men alike watch as Luffy tries to obliterate a boat with a barrage of brutal blows!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fish-Man Island was saved by the timely arrival of the Sea Kings, but all is not well. Luffy lost a lot of blood in his battle with Hordy, and fish-to-human transfusions are strictly forbidden!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei must decide whether or not to join the Straw Hats, and the grateful citizens of Fish-Man Island host a fabulous banquet in honor of their human heroes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew learn of epic battle between Aokiji and Akainu, a forgotten foe tries to kidnap the mermaid princess, and Hordy's gang finally gets what's coming to them!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji stumble upon a couple of Big Mam's henchmen extorting sweets from the peaceful people of Fish-Man Island, the Straw Hats make a new – and very powerful – enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats prepare to depart Fish-Man Island, a lion and a caribou come to blows over booby-trapped treasure, and Vice Admiral Smoker makes his presence felt in the New World!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew bid farewell to their new friends before setting off in search of the greatest adventures the New World has to offer!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Usopp's extreme deep sea fishing adventure lands the crew in the middle of a deadly whirlpool, but an unexpected encounter with a pod of giant whales may bail the Straw Hats out of hot water!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's arrival in the New World is marked by violent weather and the discovery of a tiny stowaway. When the Straw Hats agree to help their new friend, it could lead to big trouble with the Marines!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami hatches a plan to save Lily's father, but the arrival of an ex-marine madman throws a monkey wrench into the rescue mission.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Zoro find themselves locked in battle with their latest foes, but Nami's knowledge of the sea may be the key to escaping this scrum alive!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shuzo's squad of manned torpedoes targets the Straw Hats and the giants! The crazed captain tests Luffy's mettle in a showdown on land, but the wily pirate pulls off a supersized surprise in hopes to stomp out the madman for good

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A desperate cry for help leads the Straw Hats to Punk Hazard, an island engulfed in flames and inhabited by a mythic beast that could make short work of Luffy and the gang!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Zoro put their strength to the ultimate test in a battle with a dragon. Meanwhile, a band of mysterious intruders make their gassy presence felt aboard the Sunny!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy gets up close and personal with a torso-less Samurai! Elsewhere, Nami, Sanji, Chopper, and Franky find themselves imprisoned with the pieces of a human face!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes friends with a Centaur, Franky uses a cola-powered laser to break out of the clink, and Sanji takes a chance on a body-less Samurai!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami's soft spot for children prompts her to call off the escape and declare war on anyone who makes a kid cry. Meanwhile, Luffy and the gang take a banana boat to the icy side of the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's group finds themselves up against a gang of centaurs, Brook battles the torso of a surly samurai, and Captain Smoker encounters someone highly unexpected!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and Chopper seek a safe exit for the children, Luffy's group hopes to avoid a perilous plunge into icy waters, and Captain Smoker faces off against Trafalgar Law!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's group takes a deadly plunge into icy waters, and Trafalgar Law uses his unique abilities to rearrange Nami's group and cast our heroes into chaotic confusion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy and his mates race toward a reunion, Admiral Smoker struggles to survive a heart-stopping showdown with Trafalgar Law!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is excited to once again cross paths with Trafalgar Law, but a reunion with his mixed up crew – and the loss of his extra legs – quickly dampens the captain's enthusiasm!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Captain Smoker determines his next move, a very large pirate with alligator legs tells Luffy and the Straw Hats the true story of Punk Hazard's mysterious transformation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Toriko, Luffy, and Goku's three-way tie in the World's Best Eating Competition, the festivities are interrupted by the sudden appearance of a monster that threatens to consume every living thing on earth.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The giant children fly into a mysterious rage, and Chopper discovers the true reason for their unusual condition! Meanwhile, Zoro, Brook, and Sanji cross paths with a dangerous duo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The story of how Trafalgar Law arrived at Punk Hazard is revealed, and the Yeti Cool Brothers set their sights on a showdown with the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy tries to chase down the Yetti Cool Brothers, but Franky – still trapped in Chopper's Body – makes his mission extremely difficult. Just when all appears lost, an unexpected ally lends a hand!

programme.title: Beastmaster
programme.desc: Arina's true love, Orpheo, returns from beyond the grave to reunite with her. But it's not as romantic as it sounds.

programme.title: Beastmaster
programme.desc: Tao returns home to Xinca, only to discover his people have been run off by an evil priest.

programme.title: Beastmaster
programme.desc: Tao's depression is eased by the spirit of a dying tiger.

programme.title: Beastmaster
programme.desc: Dar and Tao must put diplomacy to good use when they get entangled in the royal family's dispute.

programme.title: Beastmaster
programme.desc: Iara, the evil demon, is determined to win Dar's love.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Adam Worth resurfaces as an avatar in a virtual Sanctuary, where he imperils Magnus and Tesla in a bid to enter the real world.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Trouble from Hollow Earth insurgents leads to a reunion...and an unanticipated betrayal.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: In search of a legendary abnormal, Magnus and Will become trapped by a cave-in.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A final confrontation looms as the team races to prevent the unleashing of a doomsday weapon.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will Magnus's plan be the salvation of Abnormal-kind...or its doom?

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) fights to destroy the Atavus as they begin a “joining” process that will create Human Atavan hybrids.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) joins forces with a down-and-out former reporter in order to convince the media of the existence of the Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval (Von Flores) resurrects William Boone (Kevin Kilner) in an attempt to lure Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) into Howlyn's (Alan Van Sprang) trap.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) releases Dr. Mataros (Margot Kidder), a convicted serial killer, from death row in a desperate attempt to find a way to kill the Atavus.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: El Paso investigators race to track down a ruthless killer who is burying his victims in shallow desert graves, dead or alive.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chaos descends on Phoenix as two serial killers compete for the media's attention and the bodies pile up faster than the police can investigate.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Investigators in East Baton Rouge, La., hunt for a serial murderer who carefully carves up and cuts the bodies of his victims after death.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When multiple victims' bodies are dumped around Louisiana's bayou area, a task force is formed to catch a killer who police believe may have strangled over 20 men.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police in Hartford, Conn., investigate a string of ruthless killings in the Asylum Hill area committed by a killer with a devastating mark that leaves his victims nearly unrecognizable.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial sniper terrorizes the entire D.C. metro area by discreetly targeting random victims out in public and in plain sight.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In 1990, a serial killer terrorizes the University of Florida's campus, killing five students in under four days; the Gainesville Ripper leaves behind a crime scene where all the victims have been stabbed but the females have been posed like dolls.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In New Jersey four bodies are found dismembered, bagged, and thrown in roadside garbage cans; the "Last Call Killer" hunted his victims openly in piano bars but no one suspected he could be hiding in plain sight, working as a local nurse.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Dallas police discover three women murdered with their eyes surgically removed; police believe they have a deranged doctor on the loose until two rookie cops find themselves on the trail of a man with a talent for taxidermy and a hatred for women.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer hijacks the highways of Sacramento as several women are found strangled with their clothing cut into precise but odd patterns; a survivor leads police to a sports car driving deviant posing as a good samaritan to poach potential victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When the Hillside Stranglers are caught police realize they still have another serial killer running rampant in Los Angeles; he tortures and toys with his model victims while keeping pieces of their jewelry as he snaps their last photo ever.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Texas authorities have a killer riding the rails and leaving a literal trail of bread crumbs after eating at victims' tables; when more murders are linked, the FBI names a Most Wanted suspect and a national manhunt for The Railroad Killer ensues.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Minnesota police hunt for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness; no one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun; he taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off - Ryder and the PAW PATROL have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: We see a flashback of how Rubble became a member of the Paw Patrol!/When Wally the Walrus gets tangled in an old fishing net, Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to get him to the surface and back to shore safely.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's carrots are disappearing and she calls Ryder and the Paw Patrol for help. /Katie is excited to be entering one of the Paw Patrol pups into a puppy grooming competition "Puptacular" in the next town.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water near Adventure Bay. /When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to help Mayor Goodway bring it back!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Western Days, when a herd of cows escape from a train at the railway station!/When their friend Alex decides he wants to be a member of the PAW Patrol the PUPS and Ryder let him come along for the ride.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's boat runs aground, Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Rocky must team up to save it before it sinks!/The PAW Patrol must pick all Farmer Yumi's fruit before an early snowstorm comes! But how can Chase help?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder, Chase, and Rubble hatch a plan to help sea turtle hatchlings safely cross the road to get to the beach!/There's a beached baby whale in Adventure Bay! Can the Paw Patrol work together to reunite it with its mother?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a lost kitty from the bay, but who will save them from all the mayhem she causes?/Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train from a rockslide!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must work quickly to fix the tracks and remove a train car at the Adventure Bay Train Station, before the next train comes./Ryder and the PAW Patrol battle the clock to fix the lighthouse.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Marshal gets a new BFF when a gosling he names "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. /When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the Paw Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jakes mountain./The pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay. Everyone thinks it's a "snow monster" and it's scaring the skiers away.

programme.desc: Ryder gets a call from the Circus ringmaster - Ellie the baby elephant has escaped from the circus train! /Mayor Goodway's purse chicken "Chickaletta" has gone missing. Ryder and the Paw Patrol search Adventure bay.

programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to rescue Alex when he takes off on his new "super trike"./Marshall proves he is a true hero when he stops to put out a real fire on the beach during a race against the clock for a trophy.

programme.desc: Mike and Frank challenge Danielle to sell a vintage carnival ride they've been storing for months. Meanwhile, the guys visit a collector with amazing pieces including an old gambling game used to get customers to spend more money.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Cruising along the California coastline, the guys know they're in for something big. Mil Blair founded the iconic motorcycle magazine Easyriders and, for the first time ever, the legend is willing to sell some of his rare collections of motorbikes.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys head to the Lone Star State, hoping to uncover a Texas-size honey hole. Once there, Mike and Frank dig through a huge outbuilding filled with dead coin-operated games.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Mississippi, Mike and Frank find what turns out to be a priceless, 65-million year-old dinosaur bone. It's appraised by the curator of the Mississippi Museum of Natural Science.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Old Man hopes to hit a home run when a baseball autographed by the 1951 World Series Champion New York Yankees comes into the shop, but he'll need to verify its authenticity before he steps up to the plate.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Corey has a chance to buy a wooden crossbow that hasn't been fired in almost 40 years--will it hold together and hit its mark or splinter, crack and fracture the deal? Meanwhile Rick blushes when a woman tries to sell her husband's Playboy collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When the Old Man gets concerned about shrinking profits, he offers a steak dinner and a cash prize as an incentive to boost the numbers.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Antonio recruits Steve to help him trade up to a big rig for an old friend who is down on his luck.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Adam and Caveman Rob head to South Africa to face the giant Bark Scorpion, the tiny Uroplectes Scorpion, and the highly venomous Lion Fish. Big pain comes in small packages, and the effects of marine animals' toxins are truly the next level of pain.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have a chance to shoot and score with a 2006 NBA Championship Ring.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Trick or Trade
programme.desc: Jimmie's cousin looks to broker a deal on an airboat, but an engine failure leaves them floating in the swamp. Back at the shop, the team encounters some rare Civil War journals.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Under The Gun
programme.desc: Johnnie checks out Bayou Bob's mechanical marvel, while Jimmie sets his sights on a rare World War I military periscope rifle.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Cash Kart
programme.desc: A customer carts in the pieces of a mini race car, and Tammie places her bets that Yankee can repair it.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: This Little Piggy
programme.desc: Jimmie looks to rope in a vintage mechanical pig, while Johnnie and Tammie scope out a Bulgarian version of an AK rifle.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Silver Dollar Spook-tacular
programme.desc: Jimmie challenges the staff to compete in a Halloween costume contest. Later, a customer brings in a 1967 Cadillac Fleetwood hearse.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Pair of Jokers
programme.desc: The guys bid on a timepiece once owned by Elvis and Joker returns to the shop with a furry friend to hunt down a deal.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Tricky Dick's Tennessee yard is littered with treasures, and though he isn't motivated to part with any of it, Mike goes hog-wild for a vintage pig ride that could be worth some serious coin.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys make a return visit to fan favorite Hobo Jack's sprawling forest sanctuary in Illinois. But wading through his "junkalanche" proves easier than making a deal.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike is a tough hitman, who makes his hits look like accidents or suicide. He's in a gang of hitmen, each with his own style. When his loved ex is killed, Mike looks for those responsible.

programme.title: The Art of War
programme.desc: UN's secretary general uses covert operations to help diplomacy along. Shaw's called back 6 months after one such operation. He witnesses the murder of Chinese UN ambassador at UN, NYC, chases the assassin and ends up a suspect.

programme.title: The Art of War II: Betrayal
programme.desc: Agent Neil Shaw returns in the no holds barred action adventure sequel. When Shaw is called out of retirement as a Hollywood film consultant by the murder of his long-time martial arts mentor, 'Mother.'

programme.title: The Art of War III: Retribution
programme.desc: When international diplomacy comes up short, extreme measures must be taken. In the newest installment of Art of War, Agent Neil Shaw is on a covert mission to stop North Korean terrorists from obtaining a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Armored

programme.title: The Mysteries Of Egypt: Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Featuring new location footage, filmed re-creations and expert analyses, this program tells the story of the Kingdom on Ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Ancient Egyptian Family Feud

programme.title: Lost Treasures Of The Ancient World: Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: This program visits, explores and restores such wonders as the Temples at Al Karnak and Luxor, the Temple at Abu Simnel and more.

programme.title: Mummies: Secrets of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: Journey to the royal tombs of Egypt and explore the history of ancient Egyptian society as told through the mummies of the past. The film follows explorers and scientists as they piece together the archeological and genetic clues of Egyptian mummies.

programme.title: The Khufu Pyramid Revealed
programme.desc: The Great Pyramids are the only wonders of the ancient world that still stand today, the greatest of which is the pyramid of Khufu. Many theories have been offered to explain its construction, but none as convincing or unique as this one.

programme.title: Egypt's Lost Queens
programme.desc: Prof. Joann Fletcher explores what it was like to be a woman of power in ancient Egypt. This programme brings to life the remarkable leadership and influence wielded by women whose levels of freedom were unique in the ancient world.

programme.title: The Last Mystery of Cleopatra
programme.desc: Even from her grave, Egyptian Queen Cleopatra continues to mystify scholars and common people alike!

programme.title: Quest for the Lost Pharaoh
programme.desc: Unraveling the tale of a priest and his family by following the clues left to us by the ancients, Vassil Dobrev will attempt to reconstruct the past in his quest for the lost pharaoh. State of the art CGI brings the ancient necropolis to life.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The Pyramid of Khufu is the only one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World which can still be seen in its original state. 146 metres high, 230 metres wide, and made from almost 2.5 million blocks, the Pyramid of Khufu breaks all the records.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: At the heart of Saqqara, the largest necropolis in Egypt, which was built around 2600 BC, is the Step Pyramid of Djoser. This pyramid, with its unusual design, is the first and most complex of all.

programme.title: Idle Hands
programme.desc: The devil will find work for idle hands to do, but what happens when he chooses the laziest teen slacker in the world to do his dirty work? Anton Tobias is a couch potato burn-out who can't control the murderous impulses of his possessed hand. Rated: R

programme.title: Flatliners

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is taken hostage by the Wraith after an attempt to destroy the Hive fails. Sheppard soon finds himself in front of the Wraith Queen, who wants answers. McKay returns to Atlantis in the hopes to convince the guards to help rescue the team.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team discovers a device created by the Ancients that, without warning, pulls Sheppard in. As the team scrambles to release him from the strange place he is stuck in, McKay discovers that time moves differently inside.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team races to foil the Goa'uld's plans to destroy Atlantis after Maj. Gen. Landry informs them that a bomb has been planted, triggered to detonate the next time the team heads to Earth. Meanwhile, two Wraith ships are heading towards Atlantis.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While testing a newly repaired puddle jumper, McKay and Captain Hugh Griffin suddenly lose control of the ship and crash into the ocean. As the jumper begins to sink slowly towards the bottom of the ocean, Griffin sacrifices himself to save McKay.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and the team discover a world that has technology created by the Ancients. But the planet's royal family does not allow anyone but them to harness the technology and treat the villagers with little dignity.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team discover two life pods floating in space. Upon further investigation, the team accidentally transfers the minds of the individuals into Sheppard and Weir. Things get worse when the team discovers the two people are out to destroy the other.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny’s attempt to recharge in a star is foiled by attacking drones, Eli suggests a risky plan to recharge in a super-hot blue giant…a star so hot it could destroy the ship…unless someone stays aboard and keeps the ship under manual control.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After a battle, Destiny’s only option for survival is a jump to the next galaxy. Crew members return to Earth to say what may be their final farewells before embarking on their journey. But a risky stop may put the entire plan in jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When a military research base is attacked, a small group of civilians and military personnel escape on a ship into deep space. But divisions emerge between those who want to attempt a return to Earth and those who want to remain aboard the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After secretly contacting Homeworld Command, Dr. Rush (Robert Carlyle) claims that he has been placed in charge by Gen. O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and that there is no hope of returning to Earth. But his assertions are soon questioned.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: An experiment goes wrong leaving Lt. Colonel Samantha Carter (Amanda Tapping) trapped in a parallel reality where martial law has been enforced and Earth is under attack from the Ori. Also starring Ben Browder, Christopher Judge, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When Daniel Jackson turns up as a Prior asking SG-1 to aid him in a plan that might very well be a trap, it's up to Maj. Gen. Jack O'Neill and the team to not only save Jackson's life, but possibly end the war with the Ori once and for all.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After Netan (Eric Steinberg), and the Lucian Alliance, are undermined by SG-1 yet again, he decides to put a bounty out on their heads. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, Claudia Black, Beau Bridges, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La policía investiga el altercado entre los Reyes y Armando, quien no se mueve del bar para no despertar sospechas; la policía lo interroga. La desaparición de Jimena y Óscar alarma a todos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo están desconsoladas y Juan se desespera porque no hay noticias de su hermano. Óscar y Jimena encuentran ayuda al atravesar el desierto, se preguntan si se trata de una alucinación.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth se emociona por el regreso de Óscar e invita a los hermanos Reyes a cenar, ellos no pueden resistirse y se conmueven al recordar a Libia. Jimena cuenta cómo sobrevivió al secuestro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan se desahoga con Norma, él no aguanta más y le pide que lo acompañe para resolver la situación a su manera. Rosario y Franco discuten por el incidente del bar, él le propone matrimonio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma recibe atención médica, todos piensan que sufre una crisis nerviosa, pero el doctor anuncia los resultados de sus análisis. Fernando estalla, los trámites del divorcio toman otro rumbo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Eva tiene en sus manos una carta para Juan, Norma le pide que se la entregue para contarle por qué se aleja. Armando presenta a Pepita, la nueva cantante que despierta los celos de Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara aconseja a Fernando, él sabe que ella conoce el secreto de su hermana. Óscar busca a Jimena en la casa de la montaña y ella lo provoca al llegar a una cascada, Norma los ve desnudos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma le explica a Juan cuál es su decisión, ella no se resiste a besarlo. Él culpa a Óscar y le reclama su ambición cuando la boda de Jimena y Leandro está a punto de celebrarse.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan está destrozado y abandona la construcción de la cabaña, Fernando está furioso. Óscar y Jimena se reconcilian, angustiados por el compromiso con Leandro, buscan una salida.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma detiene a Sara para que no revele que su hermana se marchó. Juan está decidido a confesarlo todo, llega a la hacienda con Franco y se encuentran con el derrumbe de la obra.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela y Sara se presentan en la iglesia, pero Jimena y Óscar ya están casados. Él cuenta su versión de la estafa y libra a Eva de toda responsabilidad al contratarlos, Juan lo interrumpe.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar rechaza el dinero que le ofrece Gabriela para que se separe de su hija, ella acepta el consejo de Sara y arruina los planes de su yerno, Jimena pierde los beneficios de ser una Elizondo.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams test their attention to detail in a round of speed dating.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are spinning their wheels in Abu Dhabi as they bogged down in the desert.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams discover the true meaning of head-to-head competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams stomach a local delicacy that leaves them slivering in their seats.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven of the most memorable teams return for another Race around the world, but in a dramatic series first, one team will not make it to the starting line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Mark and Mallory continue to struggle with communication and one major mistake jeopardizes their chances to keep racing.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through the Malaysian jungle where the roaring rapids crush their spirits and their homemade rafts. Plus, after being struck by taxi deja vu, one team fights to stay in the running.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One racer pours blood and tears into an exhausting Roadblock and another racer suffers a meltdown during an extremely difficult Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race continues in Sri Lanka where teams struggle to get a bite when fishing for their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The teams are in Sri Lanka, where an exhausting Roadblock drains the racers of all their strength. Also, an epic race through the countryside ends with a footrace to the Pit Stop.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race to Rome, Italy, where Racers and Roman gladiators square off in a medieval Detour. Plus, three teams strike a deal in order to try to avoid elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition gets fierce as the remaining six teams face a double U-Turn, and the Cowboys contemplate a major decision.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the final finish line getting closer, tension between two teams rises. Meanwhile, three teams make a final three alliance in hopes of making it to the final leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Racers are in Spain where another double U-turn threatens the accidental alliance. Meanwhile, one team suffers a potentially game-changing injury.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney finds $250,000 in cash from a bank robbery and decides to capture the robber himself.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's reputation brings a proposal from a Hollywood writer that he star in a television series as a sheriff without a gun.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's girlfriend becomes jealous when a pretty friend of the family stays at the Taylor home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney divides Mayberry into two hostile camps when he finds that an old assault case was never resolved.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie becomes a newspaper publisher and proceeds to put out a scandal sheet and distributes free samples.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invents a beau. When she's pressed for a name she names the butter and egg man who is married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Two fast girls from Mt. Pilot get a speeding ticket and enjoy the attention they get from the law officers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Comedian Don Rickles guest stars as Newton Monroe, an itinerant peddler who seems unable to do anything right.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife helps Opie with his schoolwork, using a teaching method all his own.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie tries to win a birthday present for his father at a carnival, not realizing that the carnival shooting gallery is crooked.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Jerry Van Dyke, brother of Dick Van Dyke guest stars as a carnival's destitute banjo player. He also proves to be an inept lawman when he is hired in Barney's Fife's absence.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's son, Opie, demands that their new housekeeper, Andy's aunt, be fired after the old one leaves to get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives the state troopers a lesson in the efficiency of a county sheriff when a dangerous criminal escapes.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A hometown guitar player auditions with a dance band in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker, a pretty young graduate pharmacist, moves to Mayberry to help her uncle out in the local drugstore.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy thinks Ellie is out to marry him. After a series of misunderstandings, Andy finally takes Ellie to the church picnic.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives his son, Opie, a lecture on keeping promises, but must break one of his own in order to persuade a runaway kid to come home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie stage a hold-up at the drugstore so that Barney can impress Miss Rosemary with his heroics.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy makes a judgment concerning his son, Opie, before hearing the boy's side of the story.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to stop a long-time feud between 2 mountain families so their children can get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker sets the men and women of Mayberry against each other when she runs for a seat on the town council.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney give a Christmas party in the jail for a prisoner and his family, and thereby convert the town scrooge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A stranger comes to Mayberry and disrupts the life of the townspeople because he knows everyone's name and business.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer descends on Mayberry and the town proceeds to make itself over in Hollywood's image.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy does some slick dealing to get rid of the town's worthless cannon, but when Opie mimics his father's shady deed, Andy has second thoughts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, accused by Andy of being a gossip, sets out to prove that men are bigger gossips than women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, appointed judge of a beauty contest, shows the wisdom of Solomon by picking a popular winner.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a lovely spot deep in the woods where the seclusion, silence, and beauty offer serenity to the soul.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join guest artist Steve Ross today -- experience the magnificence of splendid mountains and glassy lake embraced by leafy trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the salt spray as Bob Ross paints ocean waves under abundant clouds, rolling in to spend their energy against sand and rock.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Walk along an old fence into the autumn country with Bob Ross and rest under the golden branches of a majestic shade tree.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drink in the astonishing beauty of a spectacular desert as you ride down a well traveled road with the amazing brushes of Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The final embers of the day provide a spectacular palette of blazing colors in the sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Melting snow from the mountains creates a rushing flow of water into a valley just awakening for spring. Feel the crisp new season with Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a stroll with Bob Ross deep into the swamp and breathe in the fragrances of damp earth and moss-filled trees on a rill bank.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Grab a cold lemonade and follow along with Bob Ross as he leads you through wooded beauty into a hot summer swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Team up with Bob Ross and travel back to the days of swimming in that lovely secluded river bend; bring back memories of a forgotten time.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross favorite - he uses blue and red highlights to accentuate the drama and beauty of a snow-bound cabin at sunset.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross and experience the quiet motionless beauty of a glassy river as the morning fog hangs onto the distant shore.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes a detour from the trail and discovers a rarely used trail through country woods.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow Bob Ross into a lovely mountain setting with magnificent evergreens, where the first touches of snow appear in the valley.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Winter scenes don't have to be cold! With a touch of the sun's warmth, Bob Ross turns the chill of winter into a golden day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enter into the realm of the far north with Bob Ross and view first-hand the glory of a cold, cold snow-blanketed wintertime landscape scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the soft coolness of late summer air and drink in the beauty of changing colors with Bob Ross as he creates this refreshing masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Haven't you always imagined walking through one of Bob Ross' beautiful landscape paintings? Watch as he makes a dream come true!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross down a little lakeside path in a secluded place; you'll delight in the discovery of a small uninhabited island.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Misty background evergreens and cheerful blue sky give Bob Ross the perfect setting for this lovely birch tree painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a warm winter morning, the surroundings still undisturbed by Nature's little creatures; enjoy the freshness of a new day not yet awake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Leisurely stroll along the beach and breaking wave with Bob Ross and experience the calm of day's end under a colorful setting sun … in an oval!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: As the night settles over a rocky coast, Bob Ross gives you a warm glow still in the sky - a painting achieved on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a beautiful summer scene today - rushing little riverlet flowing through the luscious greenery of a cabin landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' gentle brush strokes create bending palm trees on the edge of a sea coast, just before the water reaches its high point.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drink in the breathtaking beauty of spectacular cascades deep in the timberland. Bob Ross invites you create this astonishing scenic display.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Ice cold pond, snowy-covered banks, soft hues in the sky … Bob Ross teaches us to admire the simple beauty of nature.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: When a not-so-secret kiss sends shockwaves through the house, one Challenger struggles to cope with his actions that could threaten relationships back home. A physically demanding elimination requires more than just strength from the Challengers.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Tony struggles to cope with actions that could threaten his relationship at home. When Aneesa discovers that the Main House has deemed her the devil, she vows to come back and make everyone's life a living hell.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: A call from home rocks one player's game, making them question whether to continue on in the game. Unresolved tension between two players escalates into a war of words. One Challenger's morals are put to the test.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Two close friends must face off in a twisted elimination. A Redemption House twist shocks the players. A surprise in the game allows the winners of the challenge to make an unprecedented power move.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: When one Challenge diva feels like she is being silenced, she pulls a master-class political move that changes the entire game. An unexpected dirty move at the Double Cross blindsides one player.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The competitors must do battle in a scary heights competition to secure power in the game. A rivalry between two stubborn players boils over at the Redemption House.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The remaining Redemption House players compete in a winner-take-all challenge, sending a bunch of heavy hitters packing. TJ blows everyone's minds when he reveals he's been lying to them all along, and they're really competing for one million dollars

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The remaining players compete for the last spots in the million-dollar final challenge and head to a new location to start the race. One player's crash landing jeopardizes their chances at the big money.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The Finalists brave the elements and extreme altitude as they race through the mountains of Argentina with a million dollars in prize money at stake. At the finish line, TJ has one last dirty trick up his sleeve

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.desc: An ex-convict is blamed for a brutal crime despite his claims of rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan. Now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight - Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A lively old lady arrives in town hot on the trail of a notorious bandit and the reward money for capturing him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance run into trouble while transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a young man, eerily similar to a man he killed in the Civil War, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to take a job as an undercover agent and goes to investigate rumors of the sales of arms to renegade Indians. His life is endangered by the town drunk who stumbles onto his true identity.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas is in Wyoming on the trail of a gang illegally selling weapons to the Indians, Mark stays with Miss Milly, where he suffers from loneliness and doubt with his father gone for 2 months.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for answers when recovering alcoholic Micah Torrence returns to the bottle and turns in his badge.

programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group debates the next step; Rick searches for a lost friend; Daryl and Merle question their choices; the Governor restores order.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group learns that a truce with the Governor must come with a huge sacrifice on their part; Rick decides Michonne's fate.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the Governor's impending attack looms, Rick and the others consider whether the prison is worth defending; Andrea struggles to escape captivity.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Facing a new enemy, Rick abandons his quiet lifestyle so that he and the others can fight to protect their hard-won livelihood.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A group leaves the prison to search for supplies; the remaining members of the group deal with recent losses.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Assorted enemies pressure Rick and the group; the survivors and the prison may reach a breaking point.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Following his defeat at Woodbury, the Governor wanders aimlessly until he encounters a family in need.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: At the camp outside the prison, the addition of new members threatens the peace; something new unfolds as the Governor plans his next move.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane y Otis están atrapados por los zombis en la escuela adonde acudieron por el material sanitario necesario para operar a Carl. En la granja, surgen las primeras tensiones y Daryl y Andrea vuelven a salir en busca de Sophie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane regresa a la granja con las medicinas, pero el sacrificio que he tenido que cometer no es bien visto por el resto del grupo. En la granja, el grupo intenta sacar a un zombi del pozo de agua fresca antes de que la infecte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras busca a Sophia, Daryl sufre un accidente que lo deja perdido y herido en el bosque. La tensión entre el grupo y los propietarios de la granja aumenta, así como la inestabilidad del propio grupo, debido a que Shane desafía a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras descubrir que la familia mantiene encerrada a sus familiares convertidos en zombis en el granero, Dale confronta a Hershel. Lori, por su parte, confiesa a Rick que está embarazada y los problemas entre los integrantes del grupo se intensifican.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn le revela a todo el grupo el secreto del granero, pero no están de acuerdo sobre cómo actuar: Rick ordena respetar la autoridad de Hershel, aunque Shane quiere acabar con los zombis. Por otra parte, descubren por fin qué le ha pasado a Sophia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hershel no soporta lo ocurrido y recae en su alcoholismo, pero Rick y Glenn lo siguen hasta la ciudad para evitar que muera. Entretanto, Beth, incapaz de aceptar todo lo que le está sucediendo a su familia, entra en estado catatónico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Lori sale en busca de Rick, pero lo único que encuentra es un peligro mortal y Shane va tras ella. Entretanto, Rick, Hershel y Glenn mantienen un tiroteo con los desconocidos con quienes cruzaron sus caminos en el bar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La tensión entre Rick y Shane aumenta y la decisión sobre el destino de Randall es el detonante: Shane quiere matarlo, Rick prefiere dejarlo vivo. Mientras, Beth pretende suicidarse y Andrea, quien debe vigilarla, no cumple con su cometido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre que Randall es un violador y asesino y acuerdan ejecutarlo, pero Dale se opone porque eso los convertiría también en criminales. Mientras tanto, Carl comete un error que acarreará consecuencias imprevistas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las diferencias entre Rick y Shane por el liderato del grupo y la gestión de la granja se intensifican cuando Shane decide por su cuenta el destino de Randall. La tensión termina estallando y los dos amigos se enfrentan a muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una horda de zombis invade la granja y el grupo intenta escapar vivo entre el caos, pero no todos lo lograrán. Además, Rick se harta de las quejas del grupo y les da un ultimátum: si quieren que sea el líder, acatarán sus órdenes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra refugio en las instalaciones de una prisión federal abandonada tras meses en la carretera. Rick considera que se trata de un lugar seguro para que Lori pase los últimos meses de embarazo, pero quizá se haya equivocado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick accede a dejar salir de sus celdas a los prisioneros si les ayudan a matar a los zombis que quedan en la prisión. Entretanto, la salud de Hershel empeora por momentos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea y Michonne descubren una comunidad de sobrevivientes liderada por un hombre llamado el Gobernador. Allá les ofrecen medicinas, comida, agua caliente y ropa limpia, pero Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y sus verdaderas intenciones.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Woodbury, Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y planea irse sin Andrea. En la prisión, un sabotaje provoca que una horda de zombis penetre en la cárcel y, mientras Rick y sus compañeros los combaten, Lori entra en trabajo de parto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick está totalmente abatido por la muerte de Lori, pero recibe una llamada telefónica sorprendente. Entretanto, Michonne ha descubierto el secreto del Gobernador y se dispone a abandonar Woodbury, a pesar de que Andrea quiere permanecer allá.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent West vows to destroy Raven, an organization that induces influential citizens to commit sabotage through mind conditioning.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Carl Frampton
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2021 Jamel Herring fought Carl Frampton for WBO World Super Featherweight title in a 12 round bout at the Caesars Palace Dubai resulting in a technical knockout victory in the sixth round for Herring.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Masayuki Ito
programme.desc: On May 25th, 2019 Jamel Herring and Masayuki Ito battled for the WBO super featherweight title in a 12 round bout at Osceola Heritage Park in Kissimmee, Fl. That ended in a unanimous decision victory for Herring.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Shakur Stevenson
programme.desc: On October 23rd, 2021, Shakur Stevenson fought Jamel Herring for the WBO World Super Featherweight Title at State Farm Arena in Atlanta. A much quicker Shakur dominated from the start, finishing Herring in the tenth round.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 1
programme.desc: On December 13th, 1991 James Toney and Mike McCallum fought eachother for the first time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City for IBF World Middleweight title ending in a draw.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 2
programme.desc: On August 29th, 1992, James Toney rematched Mike McCallum for the IBF Middleweight Title in Reno. This time, Toney came out on top via a majority decision in which many believed the scorecards were too lopsided in favor of Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 3
programme.desc: On February 22nd, 1997 James Toney and Mike McCallum face each other for the final time at the Mohegan Sun Casino in Uncasville in a strong bout that lasted 12 rounds ending in a victory for Toney.

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Janibek Alimkhanuly fought Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam in a middleweight championship bout at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. Janibek was dominant from the start, scoring a knockdown in round three and stopping N'Jikam in round eight.

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Rob Brant
programme.desc: On June 26th 2021 Janibek Alimkhanuly battled Rob Brant for WBC Continental Americas middleweight title at the Virgin Hotels in Las Vegas with Brant going down in round 6 Alimkhanuly secured the victory in the eighth round.

programme.title: Jared Anderson vs Kingsley Ibeh
programme.desc: On February 13th, 2021 Jared Anderson dominated Kingsley Ibeh during "The Bubble" at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a six round bout Anderson secured the victory by knockout.

programme.title: Joe Smith Jr vs Eleider Alvarez
programme.desc: On August 22nd, 2020 Joe Smith Jr. and Eleider Alvarez fought each other in "The Bubble" at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went the full 12 rounds Smith Jr. was able to secure the victory.

programme.title: Joe Smith Jr vs Maxim Vlasov
programme.desc: On April 10th, 2021, Joe Smith Jr fought Maxim Vlasov for the WBO World Light Heavyweight Title at Osage Casino in Tulsa. In a great battle, Joe Smith Jr barely pulled off a very close majority decision victory.

programme.title: Jose Ramirez vs Antonio Orozco
programme.desc: On September 14th, 2018 Jose Ramirez faced Antonio Orozco for the WBC World Super Lightweight title at the Save Mart Arena in Fresno, Ca. with Orozco suffering legal eye cuts in round 4 and 6 Ramirez was able to secure the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Jose Ramirez vs Jose Zepeda
programme.desc: On February 10th, 2019 Jose Ramirez battles Jose Zepeda for the WBC World Super Lightweight title at the Save Mart Arena in Fresno, Ca. with the 12 round bout ending in a majority decision win for Ramirez.

programme.title: Jose Zepeda vs Ivan Baranchyk
programme.desc: On October 3rd, 2020 Jose Zepeda faced Ivan Baranchyk in a battle for WBC silver super light weight title at the Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas with both opponents going down it ended in a victory for Zepeda.

programme.title: Josh Taylor vs Jose Ramirez
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 2021, Josh Taylor fought Jose Ramirez for the undisputed super lightweight title in Las Vegas. With a lot of bad blood going into the fight, Josh Taylor prevailed, winning by a close unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Ax Men: Reunited and It Feels Like Wood
programme.desc: Aiden's mutiny last week, and the burden of finishing the job falls on the shorthanded crew's shoulders.

programme.title: Ax Men: Back In Black
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the season the Ax Men are sprinting to the finish line.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When a large storm hits Monroe, most of the adults head to Phil and Kay's to help protect their house from flooding while Jess, Sadie, Rebecca, and Cole babysit the kids. Meanwhile, Jep, Si, Martin, and Godwin try to protect the Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Robertson brothers debate which of their wives makes the best cornbread, it escalates into a full-on cornbread cook-off. Meanwhile, when Jep, Martin, and Godwin play a practical joke on Uncle Si, it ends up being Si who has the last laugh.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Autobots are given a triple blow when one of their own is critically damaged, another is overloading destructively and the third has become an assault weapon for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Bulkhead must face off against the Constructicons and their new leader, Dirt Boss, when they decide to hold the city's oil supply hostage. Meanwhile, the other Autobots manage to capture Lugnut, but find hauling him away a more difficult task.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Unaware that he is being followed by the Elite Guard, Wasp heads to Earth to take his revenge on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: When Sentinel Prime successfully captures fugitive Decepticons, Prowl becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda. However, Blackarachnia has Swoop capture Wasp in her latest attempt to rid herself of her organic half. This experiment goes awry and turns Wasp into Waspinator.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Optimus Prime patrols the city in search of Soundwave. With Porter C. Powell selling Soundwave action figures, Optimus is paranoid that the real Soundwave is out there.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron, desperate to find the Cybertronium needed to heal the ailing Autobots on Earth. Their only hope is to free the Dinobots, who are on Cybertron under the control of Shockwave's brainwashing program.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine, he and his fellow Decepticons are sent back to medieval times. Luckily Spike, Hoist, and Warpath follow them back, and with help from Merlin, they are prepared to defend the kingdom from them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Crash-landing on the moon Titan, the Decepticons trick the population into believing they are “Sky Gods” and that the people should serve them. Desperate to free her people, a brave girl sends an S.O.S. to the Autobots…but will they arrive in time?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth’s core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth's core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts in New York City. Once he is repaired by his human friend Raoul, the two uncover a Decepticon plan to turn the cars into an unstoppable Decepticon army!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race. While they are racing, Megatron is given the perfect opportunity to use his latest weapon - the Transfixation Ray, a device that locks the Autobots into car mode, unable to change back to robot form.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Primus tries to use his spark energy to stop the black hole but Starscream interferes by throwing himself into Primus's spark energy, this causes him to grow to planet size. He then decides to take on Primus.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron

programme.title: Transformers Beast Wars

programme.desc: Champion Santana Garrett wants revenge on Tessa Blanchard for what she did to her beloved father. Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard gets what she wants… a shot at the Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Psycho Sister Razor has her debut match against Faith The Lioness. Plus, following the unprecedented Triple Threat Match, the most prestigious prize in women’s wrestling, the WOW World Championship Title, is decided tonight!

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Norwegian Nightmare, Nikki Krampus makes her long-awaited debut. Beaten in a back alley, Keta Rush seeks revenge against her assailant The Dagger. But Keta soon finds that to succeed she will have to fight off the more than just The Dagger.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: A new Champion in WOW is coming to terms with the fact the bullseye of her competitors is now squarely focused on her. Havok, The Monster Of Madness emerges as a threat to the WOW roster.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Dedicated to her ambition of never quitting, Stephy Slays demonstrates perseverance in an extraordinary match against The Disciplinarian. The smart ending will be unforgettable. Meanwhile, Tessa Blanchard takes her biggest risk since joining WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard is the new WOW World Champion, and The Beast, Jungle Grrrl, and Havok The Monster Of Madness have lined up to challenge the Champion. A Triple Threat Number One Contender Match will decide who will wrestle Tessa Blanchard.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard seemingly conspires with World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez to handpick her Championship opponent ...WOW’s newest competitor, Mexico’s high flying Luchadora Serpentine.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Foes Jungle Grrrl and The Beast are forced to put aside their differences to battle The Monsters of Madness, Havok, and Hazard. Can the two animals of the ring coexist long enough to secure victory? The Tag Team Championship Series continues.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With only a handful of life points remaining and the Nordic God, Thor, staring down at him, Jack gets set to take on his next opponent - Team Ragnarok's Broder!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the tournament on the line, Yusei must find a way to defeat Halldor before the three Nordic Gods knock his life points down to nothing!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: The grand finale of the World Racing Grand Prix is set to start, and our two finalists -Team 5D's and Team New World - are ready to take center stage. For Yusei, Jack and Crow, second place isn't an option!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: It's one down and two to go for Team 5D's as Jack and his mighty Red Nova Dragon get set to take on and take out Primo and Jakob of Team New World!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
